titleStmt.title: SII 38.502: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 502. (A.R. No. 502 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription is carelessly engraved with a lot of scribal errors and also much damaged at the end. It begins with the historical introduction of the king, Pūmaruviya poḻilēḻum etc., It seems to record a gift of land, probably after purchase by Śrutimāṉ Muvāyirattoruvaṉ Jananāthan alias Edrilisōḻa Nāḍāḻvāṉ, for celebrating a festival called Ūrōsaṇi-ttirunāḷ (asterism of Rōhiṇi) at the temple. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmaruviya poḻileḻum poruppeḻum puṉai nittala tāma neṭuṅkuṭai poḻinta tavaḷa veṇṇilāk kuḷir potiyac cuṭaṟ cakkara veṟpil taṉṟaṭac cakkaram veyileṟippa ciṉappuliyuñ ceṅ
koṉumRead ceṅkolumAṉaittuyiṟkkum kāvalpūṇap paṇiyaṇi micaippāñ cotip pāṟkaṭaliṉ ṟeḻuntaruḷi maṇi neṭumuṭi kavittu tānneṉa maṇmaṭantaiyai kaippiṭittu malarmaṭantai maṇiyāra varai mārviṟ kuṭi vāḻa pu(ku)
la maṭantai koḻuṇṇanākiDo koḻuṉaṉākipormaṭantai maṇam puṇarntu paruti mutal kulaviḷaṅkavum curutikaḷ poruḷ vārikkavum viḻnta vaṟucamaiyattaiyum miḷaveṭuttoti Ukam koḻuntu viṭṭut taḻaittoṅka koṭā
taṟaṅkuḷir vāṅka mārivāyttu vaḷañcurakka tāraṇiyor piṇiruṅkaDo piṇiniṅka nallār naṅkaṟpuyar nānmaṟaiyor toḻilvaḷara Ellārum tanit taniye yām vāḻntatena makiḻ(ḻ) Oruvaruṭan Oruva(ṟ)ṟkum Onṟin
nuṭan Onṟikkum veruvvaru pakai manat tinṟi viḻaintu kātaluṉuṭan cera Intiran mutaṟṟicāpa(ra)lar Eṇmarum Oru vaṭivāki vantapaṭi Ituvena ninṟu manuvāṇai taninaṭātti māli(yi)yānaiye piṇippūṇpana maṇiccilampe pu
laṟṟuvana celloṭaika(ḷ)ḷe kalakkuṇpana temmāve vaṭuppaṭuvena mā(ma)llare koṭiya vāyin kaḷḷuṇpana vaṇṭukaḷe poyyuṭaiyana neṭuvaraiye maruḷuṭaiyana Enmānkaḷe kayaṟkulame piṟantoḻuku kaittāyare kaṭintoṟuppār Iyaṟ pula
vare poruḷ veṭpār Icaippāṇare kūṭañ ceyvārenṟu kūṟiya Ivan kākkun tirunāṭṭin ninniyal Ituvena ninṟu kāvalan neṟi pūṇṭu neṟiyallatu niṉaiyātu tantai Il(la)lon tantaiyākavum tāyaārillor tāyaārākiyum maintaril lora maintarā(ra)kiyum mannuyi
r kaṭkuyirāki viḻipeṟṟa payanane(na)vum meypeṟṟu Aru(ḷa)ḷe(na)navum moḻipeṟṟa muka(ma) me(ṉa)ṉavum mukam peṟṟa paṉuvalivena(na)vum Ettuṟaikkum Iṟaivan(e)navum yāñ ceyta perun tava(m)meṉavum mut(t)emiḻarku talaiva(na)nevum munṟulakil mutal va(n)nevum Araciyaṟ kaimuṟai
niṟitti Allāṭintaṟuttu poruḷ kaliyum Iruḷ nikki pukaḻḻennum nilā parappi kannaṭarum kāliṅkarum tennavarum vaṅkāḷa(ra)rum koṅkaṇarum kocalarum kuntaḷarum perppāḷarum pūluvarum mattirarum marāṭṭaru Eṉṟu koṭi nuṭaṅku ka
ṉaka kopura koṟṟavācalivan tiṇṭi �tiṟaikaḷḷena kanaka koṭiyāl Iyaṟpāvalalori vakaṟṟi vaṉ kulaṉ taḻaikka vā ṉāṉanātaṉ taṉi tiruppuyañ cohavaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉap puṇṇiyañ cer poṟkoṭiya maṉṉiya perumpukaḻ paṭaitta teṉṉavan
kiḻānaṭikaḷum Ūḻiūḻi pala kaṟppavāḻ maṇam pun tiruppa Utaikari Ucciyeṟimativeṇkuṭu putu niḻaṟ kiḻcantira maṇṭala viracimhātanattu Ulakuṭai mukkoḷkiḻānaṭika(ḷ)ḷo
ṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya koparājakecaripaṟmarāṉaRead kovirājakecaripaṟmarāṉatiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu vatu Ulakuṭai nen Ūṟṟattūruṭai curutimān
muvāyirattoruvan jaṉanāta(ru)nāna Etirilicoḻa nāṭāḻvān ceykiṟa Orocāṇit tirunāḷaikku nipantaṅkaḷukkummākaviṭṭa nilattu nila vilaiyāvaṇa cey nilattil viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku
ninṟu teṟku nokki pona
Digital edition of SII 38.502 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
